basic_details.job_title: Tripura High Court Group D Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Peon, Orderly and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: High Court of Tripura is recruiting 04 Group-D posts for Family Courts.

application_fee.details: Fee to be paid online only. No refund.

age_limit.details: Minimum: 18 years Maximum: 40 years (for UR) Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST, Government Servants, Physically Disabled, Ex-Servicemen

qualification.details: criteria: Details | age limit: 18 to 40 years (relaxation as per rules)
qualification.education_qualification: Madhyamik / Secondary School Examination passed or equivalent

selection_process: Written Examination (75 Marks) Viva-Voce / Interview (25 Marks)
Only candidates qualifying in the written exam will be called for interview (ratio 1:6).

exam_pattern.details: Written Examination: 75 Marks (Duration: 2 Hours) | Viva-Voce: 25 Marks

syllabus.details: Written Examination: 75 Marks (Duration: 2 Hours) | Part Subject Marks I Letter Writing 25 II Hand Writing Test (Eng & Bengali) 25 III General Knowledge & Current Affairs 25 | Viva-Voce: 25 Marks

important_instructions: Only online applications accepted. No hard copy. Government employees must produce NOC. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. Candidates must bear their own expenses for the selection process.

content_sections.heading: High Court of Tripura Group D Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: High Court of Tripura has invited online applications for Group-D (Peon/ Orderly/ Guard) posts. The notification contains complete details on vacancies, pay structure, eligibility, age limit, selection process, and application instructions. Candidates are strongly advised to read the full notification before applying. Download High Court of Tripura Group D Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are announced in High Court of Tripura Group D Recruitment 2026?
Q2. What is the last date to apply for High Court of Tripura Group D posts?
Q3. What is the educational qualification required?
Q4. What is the salary for Group D posts in High Court of Tripura?
Q5. What is the age limit for High Court of Tripura Recruitment?
faq.answer: 18 to 40 years (with relaxation for reserved categories).

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for Tripura High Court Group D?
Q7. What subjects are in the written exam for Group D posts?
faq.answer: Letter Writing, Hand Writing Test, and General Knowledge & Current Affairs.
